allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); text=data[0]['text']; issues=json.loads\(text\); print\(json.dumps\([{'id':i['identifier'],'title':i['title'],'team':i.get\('team',{}\).get\('name',''\),'state':i.get\('state',{}\).get\('name',''\),'completedAt':i.get\('completedAt',''\),'description':i.get\('description',''\)[:200] if i.get\('description'\) else ''} for i in issues], indent=2\)\)")
